commands.review_summary:
The PR resets Vitest timers around realtime websocket session tests and bounds the local test WebSocket server payload size.

PR surface: Tests +10. Total +10 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: no. I did not run the failing non-isolated shard in this read-only review. Source inspection confirms the relevant unit-fast config is non-isolated and the affected test uses fake timers, while the PR body supplies focused Vitest proof.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No repair lane is needed because this maintainer-labeled PR has no actionable patch defect from review.

target.title: test(realtime): isolate websocket session timers
target.body:
## Summary
- Reset Vitest timers to real timers before and after realtime websocket session tests.
- Prevent the connect-timeout assertion from hanging when the non-isolated `unit-fast` shard inherits fake timers from another test file.
- Bound the local test WebSocket server payload size so precise security scanning accepts the touched test helper.

## CI Failure
`checks-node-core-fast` failed in run 26666747372 job 78601680668 because `src/realtime-transcription/websocket-session.test.ts` timed out in `applies the connect timeout while resolving async connection details`.

Provenance: the timeout-dependent test was added in refs 7a2a31dede8 and tightened in refs 781c351439. The failure is made visible by the non-isolated `unit-fast` shard when fake timers leak into this file.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.unit-fast.config.ts src/realtime-transcription/websocket-session.test.ts --reporter=verbose` - passed, 1 file / 8 tests.
- `git diff --check` - passed.
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode uncommitted` - passed before commit and after the scan fix.

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: CI-only test timeout in realtime websocket session unit tests.
Real environment tested: local macOS checkout with repo Vitest unit-fast config.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: focused unit-fast Vitest command listed above.
Evidence after fix: the failing test file passed all 8 tests.
Observed result after fix: the connect-timeout test uses real timers even if another non-isolated test leaves fake timers active.
What was not tested: full `checks-node-core-fast` locally; PR CI will run the full shard.
target.author: romneyda
